sections.paragraph:
ἀπάρτι just now, even now (not an Attic use) J 13:19; 14:7; Rv 13:13 (all Tdf.), s. ἀπʼ ἄρτι s.v. ἄρτι 3.

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 97
